name: Macaroni and Cheese with Tuna
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook macaroni as directed on package; drain and rinse.
2. Stir celery and olives into macaroni.
3. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
4. Place half of the macaroni mixture in an ungreased baking dish, measuring 13.5 x 8.25 x 1.75 inches.
5. Mix tuna, onion, 1 teaspoon salt, 1/4 teaspoon pepper, and cheese separately.
6. Sprinkle the prepared macaroni mixture with half of the tuna mixture; repeat.
7. Melt 2 tablespoons butter in a 2-quart saucepan over low heat.
8. Stir in flour, 1/2 teaspoon salt, and 1/4 teaspoon pepper. Cook over low heat, stirring constantly, until the mixture is smooth and bubbly.
9. Remove from heat; stir in sour cream and wine.
10. Return to heat and stir until boiling, then pour over tuna mixture.
11. Dot with 1 tablespoon butter; cover with aluminum foil.
12. Bake for 30 minutes.
13. Uncover and bake until golden, about 15 minutes.
